label: Hong Kong Entertainment and Celebrity News

timeline.event: 'Sons of the Neon Night' Leads 44th HK Film Award Nominations
timeline.description: Nominations for the 44th Hong Kong Film Awards were announced, with 'Sons of the Neon Night' securing the most nods.
The highly anticipated sequel 'Pegasus 3' led the box office on the opening day of the 2026 Chinese New Year.

timeline.event: Charmaine Sheh Shares Rare Selfie with Chow Yun Fat
timeline.description: Actress Charmaine Sheh thrilled fans by posting a reunion photo with legendary actor Chow Yun Fat from a festive gathering.

timeline.event: Veteran Actor Bill Shek Sau Plays Saxophone at 78
timeline.description: 78-year-old Hong Kong actor Bill Shek Sau impressed netizens with a lively saxophone performance shared online.

timeline.event: Jaime Chik Sparkles Discussion with Natural Grey Hair Look
timeline.description: 64-year-old veteran actress Jaime Chik garnered widespread praise and online discussion after embracing her natural grey hair.

timeline.event: Jackie Chan and Son Jaycee Reunite in Milan
timeline.description: Action star Jackie Chan and his son Jaycee were spotted reuniting in Milan during the fashion week festivities.
